news.t: JEPI and JEPQ ETFs have a new sibling: JADE
J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches Active Developing Markets Equity ETF: JADE

holdings.infoBox: JADE is an equity ETF with a total of 149 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 12.57%, Samsung Electronics at 8.44%, SK hynix at 5.90%, Tencent Holdings at 3.44%, and Contemporary Amperex Technology at 1.45%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Active Developing Markets Equity ETF (JADE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is a pure actively managed ETF, investing in equities and equity-related securities tied to emerging markets. The fund is focused on both growth and value stocks, aiming for long-term growth of capital JADE was launched on May 16, 2024 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
